display.purpose: Page-level titles only. One per route.

headline.purpose: Card titles, panel headers, major section labels.

body.purpose: Table cell content, whiteboard notes, form descriptions. Prose capped at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Status badges, vendor pills, column headers, timestamps, filter pill text.

mono.purpose: All machine-generated identifiers: shipment IDs, order numbers, sync cursors, reset URLs, error codes.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, popovers, command palette, tooltips. Applied by Radix UI primitives.

shadows.name: sheet
shadows.purpose: Side-anchored sheets and bottom drawers. Edge-anchored, not ambient.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions: hover, focus, active, open/close.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Larger surface transitions: sheet open, command palette enter.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, badge state change, row hover tint.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for most interactive elements.

motion.name: duration-enter
motion.purpose: Sheet, drawer, and popover enter animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action trigger. Forest green background. Used for primary CTA per section.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background-color: oklch(0.52 0.20 147); color: oklch(0.98 0.008 147); border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(0.38 0.14 147); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.20 147); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background-color: oklch(0.32 0.13 147); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-prominence action. Transparent at rest, mint tint on hover. Used in toolbars and table row actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background-color: transparent; color: oklch(0.14 0.008 147); border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: oklch(0.93 0.016 147); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.20 147); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background-color: oklch(0.90 0.018 147); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Irreversible actions only: reject user, revoke invite. Always paired with a confirm step.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); color: oklch(0.98 0.008 147); border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background-color: oklch(0.50 0.22 27); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Badge — Approved
components.description: Green tint badge for approved users and OK sync status.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-approved { background-color: oklch(0.52 0.18 147 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.38 0.14 147); }

components.name: Status Badge — Pending
components.description: Amber tint badge for pending users and awaiting states.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-pending { background-color: oklch(0.80 0.165 85 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.45 0.12 85); }

components.name: Vendor Pill
components.description: Identity marker for shipment vendor. Color IS the identifier; label confirms it. Fixed colors, never adjusted.
components.css: .ds-vendor-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-vendor-dip { background-color: oklch(0.80 0.165 85); color: oklch(0.22 0.04 85); } .ds-vendor-ryot { background-color: oklch(0.42 0.17 27); color: oklch(0.98 0.01 27); } .ds-vendor-fatass { background-color: oklch(0.40 0.10 150); color: oklch(0.98 0.01 150); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Mint canvas background, border shifts to forest-primary on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.14 0.008 147); letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-input { background-color: oklch(0.98 0.008 147); color: oklch(0.14 0.008 147); border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.006 147); border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; width: 100%; outline: none; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.56 0.006 147); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.52 0.20 147); outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.20 147 / 0.25); outline-offset: 0px; }

components.name: Table Row
components.description: Primary data surface. Hairline row separator, mint-accent hover tint. Action buttons visible on hover.
components.html:
UserStatusActions
Jane Smithjane@example.com
Approved
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-table-header { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 120px 120px; padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.006 147); } .ds-th { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.56 0.006 147); letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-th-right { text-align: right; } .ds-table-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 120px 120px; align-items: center; padding: 10px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.006 147); transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-table-row:hover { background-color: oklch(0.93 0.016 147); } .ds-td-stack { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-td-name { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.14 0.008 147); } .ds-td-sub { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.56 0.006 147); } .ds-td-actions { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge-approved { background-color: oklch(0.52 0.18 147 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.38 0.14 147); } .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.14 0.008 147); border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-sm { padding: 4px 10px; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: oklch(0.93 0.016 147); }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar nav entry. Full-width hover tint, sage-medium active background. No left-stripe border.
components.html: DashboardAdminReports
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 8px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 7px 10px; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.14 0.008 147); text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background-color: oklch(0.93 0.016 147); } .ds-nav-active { background-color: oklch(0.62 0.14 147 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.38 0.14 147); } .ds-nav-active:hover { background-color: oklch(0.62 0.14 147 / 0.22); }

narrative.overview:
The GreenBox 3PL operations dashboard is built for the rhythm of a well-run warehouse: a small, trusted team checking statuses, logging notes, and closing out billing at the end of the month. The interface is a dispatch board — calm, organized, status visible at a glance. Green means cleared. Every element earns its space on the surface.

Color derives from the GreenBox 3PL brand: forest green as the primary signal color, tinted mint neutrals as the working surface, vendor colors (amber, red-brown, sage) as fixed semantic identifiers. Light mode takes its cue from the GreenBox marketing site — an airy mint canvas that reads as deliberate, not sterile. Dark mode shifts to deeply tinted dark surfaces in the same green family: the brand hue never disappears, it recedes to the bones of the layout. Both themes are first-class.

This system explicitly rejects AI-generated SaaS slop: hero metrics with gradient accents, glassmorphism, gradient text clips, identical card grids, side-stripe border callouts, and modal-first interactions.
keyCharacteristics: Flat-by-default surfaces; tonal layering (not shadows) establishes depth
Dense information presentation without visual crowding
GreenBox Forest green as the sole vivid primary signal; vendor colors carry semantic weight only
All neutrals tinted toward hue 147; no chroma-zero grays, no pure black or white
DM Sans for headings (warmth, presence at size); Geist for all data and UI text (technical clarity)
Both light and dark modes; OS default, user-selectable, profile-persisted

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: GreenBox Forest (oklch(0.52 0.20 147)) is the only vivid green that appears on primary interactive elements. Every other green in the system — sage tones, vendor-fatass, chart greens — is quieter. The primary signal works because nothing else competes for its register.

rules.name: The Vendor Immutability Rule
rules.body: DIP, RYOT, and FATASS colors are never adjusted for aesthetic reasons. Brand colors are fixed.

rules.name: The DM Sans Ceiling Rule
rules.body: DM Sans is headings only. It does not appear in table cells, form fields, status badges, or any data-dense UI surface. If you're uncertain whether a text element is a heading, it almost certainly isn't — use Geist.

rules.name: The Mono Identifier Rule
rules.body: Any value that is machine-generated, user-unreadable, or a reference code uses Geist Mono. This creates immediate visual disambiguation between human-readable labels and system identifiers.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards, panels, and table rows never carry box shadows at rest or on hover. If you feel the urge to add a shadow to a card, add a 1px neutral-border border instead and step up the background tint by one level.

rules.name: The No Left-Stripe Rule
rules.body: Active nav items, callouts, and alert components never use a border-left accent stripe wider than 1px. Active state is expressed through background tint and text color shift.

dos: Do use GreenBox Forest (oklch(0.52 0.20 147)) as the sole vivid green on primary interactive elements.
Do tint all neutrals toward hue 147, even at chroma 0.005–0.01. No chroma-zero grays, no pure #000 or #fff.
Do use DM Sans exclusively for headings. Geist carries all data, labels, and UI text.
Do use Geist Mono for every machine-generated identifier: shipment IDs, order numbers, sync cursors, reset URLs.
Do use tonal layering (canvas → surface → accent tint) to establish hierarchy. Shadows appear only on floating UI.
Do present data at full density. The team is small, experienced, and trusted.
Do keep vendor colors (DIP, RYOT, FATASS) at their fixed OKLCH values. Brand colors are immutable.
Do default the theme to the user's OS preference; persist the user's override to their profile.
donts: Don't use hero metrics with gradient accents — big number, small label, saturated gradient background.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill). Use a solid color; emphasis from weight or size.
Don't use glassmorphism on cards, panels, or nav. Backdrop-filter blur is permitted only on floating UI.
Don't build identical card grids — same size, same icon-heading-body structure, repeated.
Don't use border-left wider than 1px as a colored accent stripe on any card, nav item, callout, or list element.
Don't animate layout properties. All transitions use opacity and transform only, easing out-quart or quint. No bounce, no elastic.
Don't add skeleton loaders for fast queries, animated metric counters, or pulse-badge decoration.
Don't reach for a modal as the first interaction pattern. Try drawers, inline expansion first.
Don't introduce a fourth status color without updating the badge taxonomy across every status surface.
Don't let any screen look like something AI assembled from a starter template.
